message:
feat(analytics): add comprehensive user acquisition tracking

Enhanced the GA4 analytics to capture rich user data:

Session tracking now captures:
- UTM parameters (source, medium, campaign, term, content)
- Referrer URL and domain with smart source detection
- First visit timestamp (persisted across sessions)
- Landing page on first visit
- Platform detection from user agent

New user properties:
- first_visit_date, first_traffic_source, first_traffic_medium
- first_landing_page, latest_traffic_source, latest_traffic_medium
- visit_count, is_returning_user, tutorial_completed

Smart referrer detection:
- Google, Bing → organic
- Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit → social
- GitHub → referral
- Other domains → referral with domain name

Added 9 new USER-scoped custom dimensions to GA4.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
